headline: Private University Tuition Rises 22% Over 3 Years
context: MOHE data shows average private university tuition increased from RM28,000 to RM34,000 per year between 2023 and 2026.

cards.big: Private university fees rose 22% in 3 years while wages grew only 8%
cards.sub: Middle-income families increasingly priced out of private higher education

cards.big: 48% of Malaysian undergraduates attend private higher education institutions
cards.sub: Public university spots cannot absorb demand if private fees deter enrollment

cards.big: Private Higher Educational Institutions Act 1996 has no fee cap provisions
cards.sub: Institutions set tuition based on market positioning not affordability

cards.big: Household debt-to-income ratio for education loans reached 14% in 2025
cards.sub: Families borrow more as scholarship coverage narrows

cards.big: Unregulated tuition in a quasi-public good creates a two-tier education system
Should government cap annual tuition increases at private universities
